title: ResetConnectorMetadataCacheRequest
description: ResetConnectorMetadataCacheRequest schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorProfileName.description: The name of the connector profile that you want to reset cached metadata for.

connectorType.description: The type of connector to reset cached metadata for.

connectorEntityName.description: Use this parameter if you want to reset cached metadata about the details for an individual entity.

entitiesPath.description: Use this parameter only if you're resetting the cached metadata about a nested entity.

apiVersion.description: The API version that you specified in the connector profile that you're resetting cached metadata for.
